{{CargoClone
|name=Faithful Guan Yu
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=165
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} ART +50
|gene3=For Round 1, CRIT DMG +1.5%
|gene4=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Demon Minion Skin ATK +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Demon Minion Skin ATK +50%
|}}
